title: UiPath Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year Fiscal 2024 Financial Results
text: UiPath reported its fourth quarter and full year fiscal 2024 financial results. Q4 FY2024: Revenue $405 million (+31% YoY), ARR $1.464 billion (+22% YoY), Net new ARR $86 million, Dollar-based net retention 119%, GAAP gross margin 87%, Non-GAAP operating income $111 million, Operating cash flow $146 million. Full Year FY2024: Revenue $1.308 billion (+24% YoY), Net new ARR $260 million, GAAP gross margin 85%, Non-GAAP operating income $233 million, Operating cash flow $299 million, Cash and equivalents $1.9 billion. FY2025 Guidance: Q1 Revenue $330-335 million, ARR $1.508-1.513 billion, Non-GAAP operating income ~$55 million. Full Year Revenue $1.555-1.560 billion, ARR $1.725-1.730 billion, Non-GAAP operating income ~$295 million. CEO Rob Enslin stated: "The combination of AI and automation represents a strategic transformation enabler, making digital transformation easier, faster, and empowering innovation and growth." CFO Ashim Gupta highlighted: "We achieved significant year-over-year margin expansion, including first GAAP profitability as a public company, with record cash flow."
